subject: fix(debug): convert remaining console.error in eventBus changedEvent listener
body:
The replace_all missed the second console.error in the changedEvent forEach
because it had a slightly different format (trailing colon). Both listeners
now use debugLog consistently.

Tags: debug, eventBus
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-logging
Semver: patch
